rules.h1: font-heading text-5xl sm:text-6xl tracking-tight text-white drop-shadow-md

buttons.primary: bg-accent text-white hover:bg-primary-foreground transition-colors px-6 py-3 rounded-full font-body font-medium flex items-center justify-center group

cards.product: bg-card rounded-2xl p-4 flex flex-col gap-3 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow
cards.category: bg-card rounded-3xl p-6 aspect-square flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-center cursor-pointer hover:bg-primary/20 transition-colors

inputs.default: border border-border bg-white rounded-full px-4 py-3 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-accent outline-none font-body w-full

nav.style: sticky top-0 z-50 bg-background/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-border py-4
nav.elements: Logo left, Links center (hidden on mobile), EN/ES toggle + Mini-cart right

hero.video_container: sticky top-0 h-[100vh] w-full overflow-hidden bg-black

fallbacks.mobile: autoPlay loop muted playsInline (disable scroll-scrubbing for performance if needed)

sections.name: Promo Banner
sections.style: bg-accent text-white text-sm text-center py-2 font-medium font-body

sections.name: Tagline Ribbon
sections.text: Feel-good products to celebrate all kinds of beauty & share positive energy ✨

sections.name: Featured Banner 1
sections.layout: flex flex-col md:flex-row items-center gap-8 bg-card rounded-3xl p-8
sections.headline: Soft & Hydrated Lips 👄

sections.name: Featured Banner 2
sections.layout: flex flex-col md:flex-row-reverse items-center gap-8 bg-card rounded-3xl p-8 mt-8
sections.headline: LASH CHAMPION MASCARA 🤍

sections.name: Forms
sections.description: Newsletter, Contact, and Booking Form (in-store glam appointments) - POST to backend.

instructions_to_main_agent.1: Use the exact provided color HSL values in tailwind.config.js and CSS variables.
instructions_to_main_agent.2: Import Google Fonts (Dancing Script & DM Sans). Set Dancing Script for '.font-heading' and DM Sans for '.font-body'.
instructions_to_main_agent.3: Hero Video Scrubbing: Wrap the hero section in a `h-[300vh]` container. Inside, use a `sticky top-0 h-screen` container. Use framer-motion `useScroll` to map `scrollYProgress` to `videoRef.current.currentTime`. IMPORTANT: For mobile users or `prefers-reduced-motion`, gracefully degrade to a muted auto-playing looping video without scrubbing.
instructions_to_main_agent.4: Ensure `data-testid` attributes are present on all buttons, form inputs, and interactive components.
instructions_to_main_agent.5: Replicate Siella's aesthetic exactly: Em-dash button pattern ('Add to Bag ─ AED XX'), soft cream cards on pink backgrounds, and emoji embellishments.
instructions_to_main_agent.6: Use neutral brand 'BrowsEMS' but implement it using the provided neon logo in the header.
